/usr/bin/g++-10 -fPIC  -Wno-deprecated-declarations -pthread -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libimgui.so -o ../lib/libimgui.so CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/viewer/imgui/imgui_demo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/viewer/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/viewer/imgui/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/viewer/imgui/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/viewer/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/viewer/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/viewer/imgui/imgui.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/yunxiangyang/miniconda3/envs/ominiGS/lib /home/yunxiangyang/miniconda3/envs/ominiGS/lib/libglfw.so.3.4 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
